role: This directory aggregates critical reports defining the public interface and risk assessment of the ArchSpine system.
responsibility: Combined, these documents provide a machine- and human-readable reference of the system's public surface (CLI, MCP, and module entry points) and an actionable risk hotspots analysis that guides developers and project leads in prioritizing code review, testing, and refactoring efforts.

children.role: Generate a risk hotspots report for the ArchSpine project
